def negative_async_retry_sleep_without_backoff():
    rule_id = "async_retry_sleep_without_backoff"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Retry-style async loops that sleep a fixed interval without visible backoff, jitter, or bounded retry policy."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
